zarr_metadata.json_semantics: not JCS; the writer emits deterministic compact JSON while the reader accepts semantic JSON key order and insignificant whitespace
zarr_metadata.empty_optional_members: attributes and storage_transformers may be omitted or explicitly empty; the deterministic writer omits them
zarr_metadata.configuration_free_codec_spelling: crc32c is exactly a name-only object as required by the pinned Zarr 3.0 metadata grammar; string shorthand is rejected

fill_values.float32_pixels: JSON numeric positive zero; the deterministic writer emits 0.0

zarr_metadata.packed_index_dimension_names: the member is omitted and any present member is rejected
zarr_metadata.scope: empty Zarr groups, the nine storage-array rows, and the closed OME image-group DTO

ome_image_group.closed_members: unknown or duplicate members are rejected at the group, attributes, ome, multiscale, axis, dataset, and transform levels
ome_image_group.namespace: attributes contains only ome; ome contains version=0.5 and exactly one multiscales item; omero is forbidden
ome_image_group.multiscale: contains exactly axes and one through seven datasets ordered by relative path s00 through s06
ome_image_group.axes: exactly ordered t,c,z,y,x; regular time carries second; nonregular time omits unit; diagonal spatial axes carry micrometer; arbitrary-affine projection omits spatial units
ome_image_group.transforms: each dataset contains one five-value scale followed by at most one five-value translation; channel scale is one; time and channel translations are positive zero; time and channel are never downsampled
ome_image_group.spatial_projection: diagonal geometry stores exact micrometer scale/translation; arbitrary affine stores unitless identity spatial transforms and remains M4D-owned
ome_image_group.translation_omission: translation is omitted exactly when all five values are positive zero
ome_image_group.number_semantics: the reader accepts finite semantic JSON numbers but rejects stored negative zero; the writer normalizes zero and emits one deterministic compact representation
ome_image_group.official_schema_boundary: offline pinned OME schema validation and independent readback remain package-validator and T1 evidence gates

normalization.transform_negative_zero: normalize to positive zero before encoding; a stored negative-zero spelling is noncanonical

cross_object_boundary.display_object_local_rule: layers are strictly increasing and unique
cross_object_boundary.package_rule: profile, science, and display must have the same nonempty contiguous logical-layer ordinals

recipe_graph.input_uniqueness: unique by the ordered pair role then node

package_manifest.path_ordinals: image 0 through 3 and scale 0 through 6; shard coordinates use canonical unsigned decimal components
package_manifest.page_entries: nonempty and strictly sorted unique by ASCII package path
package_manifest.page_packing: path-sort descriptors, then greedily append the next descriptor iff the exact canonical page remains within the byte limit
package_manifest.root_pages: one through six contiguous p######## paths from zero, positive counts and byte lengths, and strictly increasing nonoverlapping path bounds
package_manifest.cross_page_verification: each reference matches exact count, bounds, bytes, and digest and flattening then repacking reproduces the identical greedy pages
package_manifest.root_package_id: SHA-256 of the exact canonical root bytes; package_id is not stored inside the root

local_metadata_catalog.entry_order: parse the bounded profile, then the canonical manifest root and all one through six authenticated manifest pages
local_metadata_catalog.verified_objects: verify exact bytes and parse the profile, science, display, empty Zarr groups, image-group OME metadata, and every profile-addressed Zarr array metadata object
local_metadata_catalog.portable_record_policy: profile paths and manifest descriptor roles are checked during open; portable record bytes remain lazy
local_metadata_catalog.descriptor_set: every non-shard descriptor must be exactly one profile-derived required metadata/control path; shard descriptors remain authenticated claims but their files are not read
local_metadata_catalog.cross_object_checks: profile/science/display identity and layer sets match; physical channels exactly cover c; OME level/time/base geometry and IO-2 eligibility match science; co-grouped layers share science grids; per-level pixel dtype and ceil-divided shapes, validity t,c,z,y,ceil(x/8), and packed-index logical-brick counts match
local_metadata_catalog.reported_metric: exact metadata bytes read is retained for the later metadata-open evidence gate
local_metadata_catalog.non_claims: open does not enumerate directory closure, verify shard bytes, decode indexes, compute scientific identity, or imply full package validation

portable_records.scope: initial package-contained version-1 portable records; adding another source or license literal is a hard schema change
portable_records.record_ordinals: zero through thirteen and equal to the ordinal in m4d/records/r########.json
portable_records.subject_id_order: strictly sorted unique by exact ASCII typed-id spelling
portable_records.nfc_set_order: strictly sorted unique by normalized UTF-8 bytes
portable_records.source_identifier_order: strictly sorted unique by scheme ASCII bytes then value UTF-8 bytes

source_schemes.sha256: exactly 64 lowercase hexadecimal digits for the source object's raw bytes

portable_records.doi: lowercase ASCII, at most 255 bytes, 10. then 4 through 9 digits then / then one or more [a-z0-9._;()/:-] characters; no URL or doi: prefix
portable_records.citation: title and creators are nonempty NFC text; creators preserve semantic order and may repeat; year is null or 1000 through 9999; DOI is independently nullable

derivation_record.scope_kind: package-contained m4d-portable-record derivation payload; external packaging records are a separate future schema
derivation_record.binding_order: strictly sorted unique by role ASCII bytes then exact typed-id ASCII bytes
derivation_record.input_id_families: all version-1 TypedId variants; later recipe and package validation owns semantic role compatibility
derivation_record.output_id_families: all version-1 TypedId variants in the base derivation body
derivation_record.scope: CanonicalValue map with exactly layers, space, and time entries in canonical key order
derivation_record.scope_layers: nonempty sorted unique list of u64 values no greater than u32 maximum
derivation_record.scope_time: nonempty list of maps with exactly end and start u64 entries; inclusive ranges require start no greater than end and are sorted by start then end and nonoverlapping
derivation_record.scope_space: one through 256 maps with exactly extent_tzyx and origin_tzyx; each is four u64 values, extents are positive, checked exclusive ends fit u64, boxes are sorted by origin then extent, and every pair is nonoverlapping as half-open 4D boxes
derivation_record.implementation: exactly name and version ASCII tokens plus build as the raw SHA-256 digest of the immutable implementation artifact named by the operation registry
derivation_record.coupling: input and output arrays may be empty; outcome and exactness do not silently invent or discard bindings
derivation_record.package_cycle: the m4d-portable-record wrapper rejects derivation outputs containing PackageId or ReleaseId; an external packaging record may use the base body to name its resulting PackageId without entering that package closure

release_record.dataset_series_uuid: lowercase hyphenated RFC 4122 UUID with version 4 and RFC 4122 variant bits
release_record.release_ordinal: positive u64 decimal; a later catalog validator requires increasing ordinals within one dataset series
release_record.ascii_id_sets: strictly sorted unique by exact ASCII spelling
release_record.nfc_sets: strictly sorted unique by normalized UTF-8 bytes
release_record.portable_record_digests: sorted unique and possibly empty exact-byte digests
release_record.citation: exactly title, year, and doi using the portable citation scalar rules
release_record.creators: nonempty semantic-order NFC list; repeated equal names are permitted
release_record.evidence: possibly empty entries of exactly kind and digest, strictly sorted unique by kind then digest
release_record.published_at: exact YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ UTC Gregorian timestamp, year 0001 through 9999, valid month/day and leap year, seconds 00 through 59
release_record.supersedes: possibly empty sorted unique ReleaseId set; the envelope rejects its own ReleaseId
release_record.cross_release_validation: a later catalog validator requires every superseded release to use the same dataset series and a lower ordinal
